textByHash.134ac340a08d00dd29c089d57a0da8cebe29f1e4: for. I've left my Vampyre ways behind me and now spend my days letting everyone know of this terrible danger. In return for my dedication I have been blessed with a unique ability to be able to check if
textByHash.13deec43a9d00fecac05c7830eebb709d1a38a1e: Visit the RuneScape website and log in to update your Account settings.
textByHash.15e757ec776e0041dbefcce0b64c85ba5f43dcea: [laugh][laugh][laugh]! I, Count Check, have checked your account. You have a Jagex Account, and you have set a Bank PIN, so you pass my checks! Enjoy your prize.
textByHash.2349bde7be588556b337ce05027333fea7db6ac6: THREE... Um... Use a Jagex Account. I can see you already do this.
textByHash.2446c69fde6db0ab08744a1bda152f6357063b52: You really should set a bank PIN. If your account does get stolen, your items in the bank and other places like the GE will be safe.
textByHash.2feaaa15acda94275b98afce4483a1ef55c8119e: You do not have a Jagex Account, so you fail my checks! You should upgrade before we meet again.
textByHash.3b8f66690e236504ed5e4edfedbc1a050c55f1d3: The Stronghold of Security, in Barbarian Village. There is much to learn there. But while you are here, may I check your account for you?
textByHash.3f742f6774ddf67cb90f59411ad85d8668a88846: Yes, be warned! The travellers of these lands face danger from outside. Accounts can be stolen, and when that happens one can lose everything one has worked for.
textByHash.42ae691d3366d12792142da5d3403d0b8c1f51e6: to count for you. The count loves to count.
textByHash.4797fc229b74defffa0c66367854cdaead1de76e: [laugh][laugh][laugh]! I, Count Check, have checked your account. You have set a Bank PIN, so you pass my checks! Enjoy your prize.
textByHash.5e9d04fa8392f1654ec884b5b8333fc191506d33: sure you have 2 step verification for your registered recovery email. I'll leave it with you to make sure both of those things are in place.

textByHash.63dc121de4bd068a939dc3d42154dfc44d6a74fa: I can! Count with the Count as I count the steps to securing your account:
textByHash.64e40e4262fe124eb5411fefb2e74a17e6ac5c1f: [laugh][laugh][laugh]! I, Count Check, have checked your account. You do not have a Jagex Account, nor a Bank PIN, so so you fail my checks! Please upgrade before we meet again.
textByHash.65059170217a62d6ee84422e7e17f474c2e667ec: So may I check your account for you?
textByHash.68cd0a7ca07ad814f4557b55cb13b98975452415: Ah yes, I miss that place. So lovely and dark. I left there when I heard the terrible news and now I choose to spend the rest of my days warning others of the perils that lay in wait for them.
textByHash.6a99bde03f3c96b4cdbc512855abca4cfb082d24: Never use the same password for different accounts, or on different websites. If it got leaked, all of your accounts would become vulnerable at once!
textByHash.6c0a0438496fbf3adcc6ab9908fbf3beb74f1cfe: Count with the count to easily remember my top account security tips:
textByHash.7c3360fbd6c9548c28aa6ffa69f744771bc43866: Hello you look like you've seen a ghost.
textByHash.7f4285137928b6dd072f7a3be93bb65f5da59969: You aren't using the authenticator! This is a disaster. You should enable this to keep your account secure. Simply visit the support link on the oldschool.runescape.com website.
textByHash.819c7f739bd0e49cd59bcebd9d9fdfbafff27339: Next time you visit a bank, talk to a banker and ask to check your PIN settings.
textByHash.84b29095b6134dcf006e75a096ace1fa55da51a7: Yes be warned! The travellers of these lands face danger from outside. Accounts that allow them access to this magical place can be stolen and when that happens they could lose everything they have worked so hard
textByHash.8621649ebc2a1b4f5bb214b609ca87773aff0e19: The Stronghold of Security, in Barbarian Village. I see you have not visited it. Would you like to? I can send you straight there - but only once.
textByHash.8897806f1b847fc13f00a1dfd0bf861483b6443c: I've left my vampyric ways behind me, and now I spend my days letting everyone know of this terrible danger.
textByHash.8df7f85f6ce84aabb1936bc0e42dd7dc6dfab4dc: Yes! The Stronghold of Security which can be accessed via Barbarian Village.
textByHash.951fe60bcc7a8d6ed9c41ac938f4f8f772318bec: You are using the authenticator! Excellent. This will help to keep your account secure.
textByHash.9755dafe447fa9b5fa3fc261ca1c8e195b92926f: [laugh][laugh][laugh]! I, Count Check, have checked your account. You do not have a Bank PIN, so you fail my checks! Talk to a banker to set a PIN before we meet again.
textByHash.9c29fe78b22c616b6ff4086807fcf7384db6427f: I have come to check you...
textByHash.9eafc977e72b329a9bc9ad6ed051263d7f77c83e: [laugh][laugh][laugh]! I, Count Check, have checked your account. You do not have a Jagex Account, so you fail my checks! You should upgrade before we meet again.
textByHash.b26c64557be90edf8a2506b63ccb93d3f544ee05: You have a Jagex Account, and you have set a Bank PIN, so you pass my checks! As you've passed my check for the first time, I award you a prize.
textByHash.b487798dc8e2f3cd5d4e8fcfd009d2e50c1334a6: Yes there is. by counting. I am a count, who likes to count and check accounts. You can ask me to check your account at any time you like and if you want to remember my top tips for account security just ask me
textByHash.b8faeeeda60b1783c5e189d2972067282010f7d5: TWO... step verification for your email account!
textByHash.ba6dcd782b5a4fb3c1a822ff2f6cd348a2cfd224: You have a Jagex Account, and you have set a Bank PIN, so you pass my checks! As you've passed my check before, there's no prize now.
textByHash.bacc8fcf4913d82b3f51d53b9ba1b026e72a0cba: You do not have a Jagex Account, nor a Bank PIN, so so you fail my checks! Please upgrade before we meet again.
textByHash.be9868fb259d017207ae564a520b3c45d7f9be65: FOUR... digit Bank PIN! I can see you do not use banks, by the way.
textByHash.c2fa1d93ea8f60ba36e9d236de76522153104d9d: As you may see, I am a vampyre, from Morytania. I left there when I heard the terrible news and now I choose to spend my days warning others of the perils that lay in wait for them.
textByHash.cadba902089429e0d9d228edcae25524774f94d1: You have a bank PIN. This is good, but make sure that it's one that can't be easily guessed.
textByHash.ce2adde4ad000368e3b5595526313bd55241779c: Now let me take a look at some of your other security settings for you...
textByHash.d01e94bb5982654596aa20b3e39758df90fc010e: What do you mean? 'If' I am a vampyre? Of course I am a vampyre! See my pale complexion, my teeth, my outfit - how could anyone doubt I am a true vampyre?
textByHash.e8e8ef030051c64e4e4201e939246b0f693ebfbd: I used to stalk the night drinking blood like vampyres do, and I am certainly not just a role-playing enthusiast in a costume! Never question that!
textByHash.ec5c3d66a031926a4e2e0f485ffefed058f36d6d: THREE... Um... Use a Jagex Account.
textByHash.f2811086c78e062380adc7851c4a14b9651d2208: I came to check , not you.
textByHash.f2f2b5835441530a2bf75959d530b789794dc5d7: Look, I'd got something for ONE, TWO and FOUR, and I like counting, okay? Don't interrupt my flow!
textByHash.f8c0760bd38b842f026509bb0aa19a6f2d554ee2: In return for my dedication, I have been blessed with the ability to check if adventurers are ready to defend themselves against these account thieves.
textByHash.fb09f5ae57a24e040cef35ae71fd9a777f4585da: Good email providers let you set up two-step verification, maybe by generating security codes on a second device, or by sending codes to your phone. Make sure you've enabled this.
textByHash.fe22a62baf66bf7d75aee238244c864942274489: Ok let me check your account security, but before I do there are some things that even I can not see. Firstly you must have a unique password for your account and not share it with anyone else and secondly make
